desc: Umbrella for the B0 interim boot path: an enrolled raw m1n1 object boots a self-contained kernel+J614s DTB+Alpine RAM root from the dedicated APFS boot volume, with no host payload upload. The concrete experiment ladder is docs/BOOTABLE_BUILD_EXPERIMENTS.md: ticket 080 audits the raw-object payload contract, 081 builds and prepares a tethered single-object proof, and 082 prepares reversible enrollment/cold boot. Direct m1n1 payloads are preferred for B0; U-Boot is ticket 025/B1 unless the payload audit proves it mandatory.
author: claude
